identity.name: SYNQRA
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk warmth with Swiss precision.
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'alive' and 'intelligent'.
Content is King: Data is the art.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to frame the neon data.

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers. Use 'Syne' for that unique 'art-tech' feel.

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&family=Syne:wght@700;800&display=swap');

gradients.hero_glow: background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.15) 0%, rgba(3, 3, 3, 0) 70%);
gradients.text_gradient: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white to-gray-500

grid_modes.dashboard: High Density Grid (Tight gap-4, 100% height widgets)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 backdrop-blur-md
buttons.ghost: text-muted-foreground hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.glass: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-xl shadow-2xl

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 transition-all

hero_bg.alt: Abstract neon streaks representing AI neural network

agent_builder.alt: 3D abstract cube for agent logic construction

motion.3d_library: react-three-fiber (only for Hero if necessary, else use Spline export or simple Framer Motion)
motion.scroll: Lenis (smooth scrolling) is MANDATORY for that premium feel.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text if readability is compromised.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid.
Marketing pages use custom HTML/Tailwind. Dashboards use customized Shadcn.
Theme is STRICTLY DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly requested by user (which they haven't).
Glassmorphism requires a dark background to work. Ensure 'backdrop-blur' is used with 'bg-opacity'.
